_comment: Claude Code SessionEnd hook — calls auto_log MCP on session close. Merge the 'hooks' block into ~/.claude/settings.json (or .claude/settings.local.json for per-repo). Replace the command path with the location where you cloned your memory repo.
_env_note: Set MCP_URL in your shell profile (e.g. ~/.zshrc) to the full MCP endpoint of your deployed worker. Example: export MCP_URL="https://your-worker.workers.dev/mcp/$MCP_AUTH_TOKEN"
